sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n27236" key="dio/pteusis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διόπτ-ευσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n27236.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">examination with the</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">διόπτρα,</foreign> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ptol.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Alm.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.1</biblScope></bibl>, al.</sense> </entryFree>
